languages.text: Капитаны пустотных кораблей суеверны, и не без причины. Этот мир пользуется дурной репутацией, и мало кто рискнет сюда полететь.

traits.locale_text: Капитаны пустотных кораблей суеверны, и не без причины. Этот мир пользуется дурной репутацией, и мало кто рискнет сюда лететь.
Капитаны пустотных кораблей суеверны, и не без причины. Этот мир пользуется дурной репутацией, и мало кто рискнет сюда полететь.

languages.text: Voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.
languages.original_text: Капитаны пустотных кораблей суеверны, и не без причины. Этот мир пользуется дурной репутацией, и мало кто рискнет сюда полететь.

traits.locale_text: The voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.

Voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.

languages.text: Kapitäne von Leerraumschiffen sind abergläubisch, und das aus gutem Grund. Diese Welt ist unter den Leerraumfahrern so berüchtigt, dass nur wenige einen Besuch riskieren würden.
languages.original_text: Voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.

traits.locale_text: Kapitäne von Leerraumschiffen sind abergläubisch, und das aus gutem Grund. Diese Welt ist unter den Leerraumfahrern so berüchtigt, dass nur wenige einen Besuch riskieren würden.

languages.text: Les capitaines de vaisseaux du vide sont superstitieux, et ce pour une bonne raison. Ce monde est tellement connu des voyageurs du vide que peu se risquent à le visiter.
languages.original_text: Voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.

traits.locale_text: Les capitaines de vaisseaux du vide sont superstitieux, et ce pour une bonne raison. Ce monde est tellement connu des voyageurs du vide que peu se risquent à le visiter.

languages.text: Los capitanes de naves vacías son supersticiosos, y por una buena razón. Este mundo tiene tan mala fama entre los habitantes del vacío que pocos se arriesgan a visitarlo.
languages.original_text: Voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.

traits.locale_text: Los capitanes de naves vacías son supersticiosos, y por una buena razón. Este mundo tiene tan mala fama entre los habitantes del vacío que pocos se arriesgan a visitarlo.

languages.text: Boşluk gemisi kaptanlarının batıl inançları vardır ve bunun iyi bir sebebi vardır. Bu dünya boşluk gemicileri arasında o kadar kötü bir şöhrete sahiptir ki, çok azı onu ziyaret etme riskini göze alır.
languages.original_text: Voidship captains are a superstitious lot, and for a good reason. This world is so notorious among the voidfarers that few would risk visiting it.

traits.locale_text: Boşluk gemisi kaptanlarının batıl inançları vardır ve bunun iyi bir sebebi vardır. Bu dünya boşluk gemicileri arasında o kadar kötü bir şöhrete sahiptir ki, çok azı onu ziyaret etme riskini göze alır.
